findings.note: 10 web searches executed (above 8 minimum). Coverage spans visual references, audio direction, mockumentary technique, anthropological precedent, and stock-asset feasibility.
Three angles identified with genuinely different shapes: 24-hour-cycle narrative (A Day in the Habitat), thematic-focused (The Greeting Behaviors), and academic-research-log (Field Notes from Earth).
Saturated angles flagged explicitly — Clubbing in the Wild and Jeff Wright TikTok are the dominant prior art. Differentiation strategy is documented.
